notes: Main Menu shell art is reference-driven, but multiple portrait wells and identity slots are populated from Steam or live fallback portraits at runtime.
These interiors should be treated as socket-frame regions during generation and as masked or manually validated regions during packaged review.
The title lockup remains baked art. The tagline, top-bar labels, CTA labels, friend/profile/party text, leaderboard controls, leaderboard rows, and currency values are runtime text/value regions.

regions.region_hint: full-screen dungeon/idol environment behind all UI
regions.notes: The runtime background is SourceAssets/UI/MainMenuReference/scene_background_purple_imagegen_1920x1080.png. It must contain only environment art, with no top bar, panels, CTA stack, labels, avatars, leaderboard rows, icons, or other foreground UI.

regions.region_hint: top-bar backing strip behind live top-bar buttons
regions.notes: The top-bar backing is TopBar/topbar_backdrop_clean.png. Button rectangles are transparent so stateful button sprites and live labels own every control pixel.
The title is Center/title_lockup_wordmark.png. The title can be baked art, but the tagline below it remains runtime/localizable text.

regions.region_hint: center call-to-action stack frame and button plates
regions.notes: The stack frame and CTA button state plates are foreground component art. They must not include baked button labels; live FText owns the button text.
The profile slot uses a live Steam avatar when available and falls back to an async-loaded hero portrait. Generate the card shell and frame only.

regions.region_hint: friend-row avatar wells in the left social panel
regions.notes: Friend portraits are live Steam avatars or fallback hero portraits inside a generated frame. Preserve the frame/shell and leave the interior live.

Invite and offline button plates are generated art only. The visible button remains a real SButton and all labels/states such as INVITE, INVITED, OFFLINE, In Party, and PARTY FULL are runtime-owned FText.

regions.region_hint: party-member portrait wells in the lower-left party shell
regions.notes: Party slots are populated with live member avatar brushes. Generate the frame shell, occupancy state, and any badges only.

regions.strict_diff_mask: mask Right.leaderboard_avatar_live_rect for every visible leaderboard row before static shell comparison
regions.notes: Leaderboard entries use live Steam avatar textures resolved by leaderboard Steam ID first, then backend avatar URLs if provided, then the empty/default socket. Backend hero portraits are not a leaderboard identity fallback. Generate only the transparent socket frame; runtime draws the Steam/API portrait underneath the frame.

regions.region_hint: subtitle/tagline below the baked title art
regions.notes: The main title stays baked into the art, but this tagline is localizable runtime text and must not be baked into the shell master.

regions.region_hint: top-bar nav labels, coupon count, utility tooltips, and stateful button labels
regions.notes: Top-bar plates are generated art, while labels and changing values remain live/localizable.
CTA plates are runtime button art, but button labels are localizable FText.

regions.region_hint: left social panel account strings, search text, friend names/statuses, group counts, invite states, and party labels
regions.notes: The social panel shell and frames are art; Steam/friend/party strings and button labels are runtime-owned.

regions.region_hint: right leaderboard filters, dropdown labels, headers, row names, ranks, scores, and times
regions.notes: Leaderboard chrome can be generated art, but all row values and filter labels are live data or localizable text.
